Hey Sarah, how was your weekend?

Oh it was great! We went hiking at Point Reyes. The weather was perfect. Have you been there?

Not yet, but it's on my list. Speaking of outdoors, did you hear about the team offsite? Lisa mentioned we might do a camping trip for the Q3 team building.

Yeah! I'm so excited about that. Lisa's been planning it with Marcus. I think they're looking at Big Sur or Lake Tahoe.

Lake Tahoe would be amazing. By the way, how's your onboarding going? It's been what, three weeks now?

Almost a month actually! It's going really well. Everyone's been super helpful. I've been mostly ramping up on the recommendation engine codebase. It's complex but well-documented.

That's good to hear. Who's been your onboarding buddy?

Marcus, actually. He's been fantastic. Really patient and explains things well. He suggested I start with the feature extraction pipeline since that's where most of the bugs tend to surface.

Smart approach. Marcus is great - he built most of that pipeline. If you need help with the model serving layer, come find me. That's my area.

Thanks, I'll definitely take you up on that. Oh, I also wanted to ask - is the team lunch still happening on Fridays?

Yep! This Friday we're trying that new Korean place on Castro Street. You should join us.

Count me in! Alright, I should get back to this PR review. Talk later!

See ya!
